summary: Iteration 183: Tested 11 features/bug fixes. All backend tests pass (12/12). All frontend tests pass including customers tab load, partner_map column removal, signup form CMS title, form validation without browser popup, line2 validation when required, company_name layout, Auth & Pages form_title/subtitle fields, FormSchemaBuilder label maxLength/readOnly/hide-toggle-suppression/auto-validate badge.

ui_bugs.issue: isPlatformAdmin check at line 29 uses `authUser?.role === 'platform_admin'` but platform super admin has role `platform_super_admin` (not matched). Partner column never shows for admin@automateaccounts.local. Fix: `authUser?.role === 'platform_admin' || authUser?.role === 'platform_super_admin'`

action_items: Fix isPlatformAdmin in CustomersTab.tsx line 29 to include platform_super_admin: `const isPlatformAdmin = authUser?.role === 'platform_admin' || authUser?.role === 'platform_super_admin';` - this is the same pattern used in UsersTab.tsx line 185
critical_code_review_comments: CustomersTab.tsx line 29: isPlatformAdmin check misses 'platform_super_admin' role — Partner column (showing partner_code) is never visible for the platform super admin (admin@automateaccounts.local). UsersTab.tsx at line 185 correctly handles both roles.
ALWAYS_VISIBLE_KEYS fix confirmed working: org_name, admin_name, admin_email, admin_password, full_name — none show Hide/Show toggle
base_currency label is correctly readOnly in FormSchemaBuilder edit panel
auto-validate badge correctly shows for email/tel field types
Label maxLength=50 correctly applied in FormSchemaBuilder edit panel

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 11 feature tests passed, 1 low-priority code review finding)

seed_data_creation: Temporarily set line2.required=True for signup validation test, restored to False after test. Temporarily changed signup_form_title via API for title save test, restored after.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Platform admin (admin@automateaccounts.local) has role=platform_super_admin. Backend login: POST /api/auth/login with email+password only (NO partner_code). Frontend login: Enter 'automate-accounts' as code at gateway, then admin credentials. All partner_map references are confirmed removed from backend and frontend. FormSchemaBuilder tests use Auth & Pages > Partner Sign-Up Page in admin panel. Signup form at /signup requires localStorage key 'aa_partner_code'='automate-accounts' to load with automate-accounts tenant settings.

rca_of_issue.root_cause: CustomersTab.tsx checks `authUser?.role === 'platform_admin'` but the platform super admin user has role `platform_super_admin`. This was already fixed in UsersTab.tsx (line 185: includes both roles) but not copied to CustomersTab.tsx
rca_of_issue.reproduction: Login as admin@automateaccounts.local, navigate to /admin > Customers - Partner column not visible even though user is the platform admin
